usage: alignPtnClone [-help] [<ptnName>] [-outFile <string>] [-checkOnly | -snapAllCorners ] [[-stripeOffset ] | [[-pgHGrid ] [-pgVGrid ] [-pgLayer {layeridList}] [-updateUserGrid ] [-snapAllCorners ] [-skipFinFETGrid ] [-includeStdCellPinLayers {layeridList}]] | [[-symmetryPatternReference <string> [-symmetryPatternTarget <string> [ [-targetOrientation {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90}] [-targetOrigin {x y}] ]]]] | [-symmetricOrientation ]] [-pgLayer {layeridList} [-pgNet <pgNetName> | -pgCenterLine <float>]] [-pgPitch <float> [-pgCenterLine <float>]]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <ptnName>
options.description: Specifies name of the partition. If not specified, the command is run on all partitions

options.name: -checkOnly
options.description: Specifies that the design should not be modified. When enabled, it only reports messages.

options.name: -includeStdCellPinLayers
options.description: Specifies layers of the standard cell pins.

options.name: -outFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the output file for additional information.

options.name: -pgCenterLine
options.description: Specifies center-line of the first virtual symmetric P/G stripe (in microns). This option can be repeated.

options.name: -pgHGrid
options.description: Provide information about symmetric horizontal P/G grid (-pgLayer, -pgNet, -pgPitch and -pgCenterLine).

options.name: -pgLayer
options.description: Specifies layer(s) for the symmetric P/G stripe. This option can be repeated.

options.name: -pgNet
options.description: Specifies name of the symmetric P/G stripe net. This option can be repeated.

options.name: -pgPitch
options.description: Specifies pitch of the P/G symmetric stripe (in microns). This option can be repeated.

options.name: -pgVGrid
options.description: Provide information about symmetric vertical P/G grid (-pgLayer, -pgNet, -pgPitch and -pgCenterLine).

options.name: -skipFinFETGrid
options.description: Disables alignment with FinFet grid.

options.name: -snapAllCorners
options.description: Snaps all corners of master and its clone partition to the user grid.

options.name: -stripeOffset
options.description: For backward compatibility and to enable private switch -track, -layer, -snap and -skip_row

options.name: -symmetricOrientation
options.description: Find correct symmetric orientation of clones.

options.name: -symmetryPatternReference
options.description: Specifies name of the partitions as reference for symmetry pattern.

options.name: -symmetryPatternTarget
options.description: Specifies name of the partitions as target for symmetry pattern.

options.name: -targetOrientation
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90} Specifies new orientation of the target partition

options.name: -targetOrigin
options.description: Specifies new origin of the target partition

options.name: -updateUserGrid
options.description: Updates the user grid with the new values.
